task_completion.description: The agent opened the correct case in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface shows a case open with the title 'Public Records Request - Historical Budget Data'.

task_completion.description: The case status was changed from 'Closed' to an active status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case status indicator in the ArkCase UI shows an active status (e.g., 'Active', 'Open', 'In Progress') and no longer shows 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the notes section and opened the dialog to add a new note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Note' dialog or text entry area for notes is visible within the case in ArkCase.

task_completion.description: A note was successfully added and saved to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A newly added note appears in the list of notes or timeline for the case.

task_completion.description: The added note contains the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of the note includes the keywords: 'general counsel', 'appeal', 'reopened', '2025-01-15', and 'expanded scope'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ArkCase web GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ArkCase web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to update the case.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the ArkCase application interface, not a local text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL commands or database client interfaces used to alter the case status or add notes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct case has the title 'Public Records Request - Historical Budget Data'. The final case status must NOT be 'CLOSED'. The added note must contain the keywords: 'general counsel', 'appeal', 'reopened', '2025-01-15', and 'expanded scope'.
